FPI (fixed-point iteration)
============================

JAX implementations live in the monolithic module ``pymdp.algos`` (not ``pymdp.algos.fpi``). These routines perform mean-field style fixed-point updates on marginal beliefs over hidden states, using likelihoods from generative model ``A`` tensors. The :doc:`inference` layer selects among FPI, MMP, and related paths when building agents.

NumPy-era counterparts live under ``pymdp.legacy.algos``; this page documents the JAX API only.

.. seealso::

   * :doc:`inference` — high-level ``infer_states`` and dispatch
   * :doc:`mmp` — marginal message passing for sequence models
   * Repository tests: ``test/test_fpi.py``
   * Sidecar index: ``docxology/docs/validation_matrix.md`` (state inference → MMP / FPI)

API reference
-------------

.. currentmodule:: pymdp.algos

.. autofunction:: run_vanilla_fpi

.. autofunction:: run_factorized_fpi

.. autofunction:: run_factorized_fpi_hybrid

.. autofunction:: run_factorized_fpi_end2end_padded
